description_long: This is a modern black sofa set consisting of a three-seater couch and a matching single armchair. Both pieces feature a boxy, geometric silhouette with straight lines and thick, squared armrests. The upholstery appears to be smooth black leather or faux leather, giving the set a sleek and contemporary look. Each seat has individual, loose cushions for both the seat and back, providing comfort and a uniform appearance. The legs are short, blocky, and minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or patterns, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A sleek black leather sofa set with a three-seater and a matching armchair, featuring straight lines, thick armrests, and individual seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full three-seater sofa and single armchair, highlighting the uniform cushions and boxy armrests.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the armrests and the thickness of the seat cushions, with minimal leg visibility.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of the seat and back cushions, and the separation between the sofa and armchair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the straight profile of the armrests and the overall rectangular form.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions on the sofa, one seat and one back cushion on the armchair; all cushions are loose and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, straight, and boxy armrests at full seat height, with a flat profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, with a simple and sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrests with individual, loose back cushions; continuous along the length of each piece with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, glossy leather or faux leather finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
